title: Synaptic Drift pages.json (schema version 1)
description: Page-level metadata for a .ctx pack. A JSON array of page records.

package.description: Package name; must not contain '@' or whitespace.

version.description: Package version; must not contain '@', whitespace, or '/'.

url.description: Path or URL the page originated from.

title.description: Page title, extracted from the first heading or filename.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the normalized page content.
